headline: Couple's 'We Met On A Dating App' Story Is Cute, But Her Opening Line Was 'Are You A Parking Ticket?'
summary: He said yes anyway. They're now engaged. The proposal also involved a parking pun.
fullBody: Jessica and Jake Parkingship met on Hinge when Jessica opened with 'are you a parking ticket? because you've got fine written all over you.' Against all odds, Jake responded. They're now engaged. The proposal included a fake parking ticket that read 'you're under arrest for stealing my heart.' Their wedding hashtag is #FineForEachOther. Their friends are jealous and also embarrassed. The couple is 'unbothered.' Their love is parking-lot strong.
